name: iclic-inc/superadmin-podcast-contributors
description: Automatically add all superadmins as contributors to every podcast.

podcast_group.label: Podcast role assigned to superadmins
podcast_group.hint: Used when a superadmin is missing from a podcast. Existing podcast roles are preserved.

author.label: Author
author.description: Can create and edit own content

sync_interval_seconds.label: Sync interval (seconds)
sync_interval_seconds.hint: Minimum delay between automatic sync checks. Default: 300.
